code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{verifyOtp}from"../api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function OtpVerifyPage(_ref){let{phone,otpPreview,onBack,onLoginSuccess}=_ref;const[otp,setOtp]=useState("");const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState("");const submit=async event=>{event.preventDefault();setError("");setLoading(true);try{const data=await verifyOtp(phone,otp.trim());onLoginSuccess(data.token,data.user);}catch(err){setError(err.message);}finally{setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"OTP Verification"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Phone: ",phone]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"hint",children:["Simulated OTP (demo): ",otpPreview]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:submit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Enter 6-digit OTP",value:otp,onChange:e=>setOtp(e.target.value),maxLength:6,required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",disabled:loading,children:loading?"Verifying...":"Verify & Login"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"secondary",onClick:onBack,children:"Back"}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"error",children:error})]})});}export default OtpVerifyPage;
